description: Curated regression-style examples for teaching: fixed inputs and expected high-level labels. Use for smoke tests and classroom walkthroughs (not a full offline eval harness).

cases.user_query: A learner wants to defer to the next cohort because of timing issues with their current job.
I cannot log into the learning portal; it says my account is locked after too many attempts.
My card was charged twice for the same cohort enrollment last week.
The video player freezes on Safari during Week 4 lab; Chrome works.
What is the refund policy if I withdraw before Week 3 starts?
